title: RapidMeta Oncology | Osimertinib in EGFR-Mutant NSCLC (FLAURA / AURA3 / ADAURA / FLAURA2) v1.0
hero_h2: Osimertinib Across the EGFR-Mutant NSCLC Treatment Landscape

pico.pop: Adults with EGFR-mutant non-small-cell lung cancer (exon 19 deletion or L858R mutation): T790M-positive after first-generation EGFR-TKI failure (AURA3), treatment-naive advanced (FLAURA, FLAURA2), or completely-resected stage IB-IIIA after surgery and adjuvant chemotherapy (ADAURA)
pico.int: Osimertinib 80 mg PO QD (third-generation, T790M-active EGFR tyrosine-kinase inhibitor); FLAURA2 adds platinum + pemetrexed chemotherapy
pico.comp: Platinum-based chemotherapy (AURA3), first-generation EGFR-TKI gefitinib or erlotinib (FLAURA), placebo (ADAURA), or osimertinib monotherapy (FLAURA2 control)
pico.out: Progression-free survival (PFS; primary in AURA3 / FLAURA / FLAURA2) or disease-free survival (DFS; primary in ADAURA, time from randomization to disease recurrence or death); HR vs control
pico.subgroup: EGFR mutation type (exon 19 vs L858R), CNS metastases at baseline, race / ethnicity (Asian vs non-Asian), age, smoking history, performance status

real_data_entries.name: AURA3
real_data_entries.group: Osimertinib 80 mg QD vs platinum + pemetrexed chemotherapy in T790M-positive EGFR-mutant NSCLC after first-line EGFR-TKI failure; primary endpoint PFS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Mok TS et al. NEJM 2017;376:629-640 (AURA3 osimertinib 2L T790M+).

real_data_entries.name: FLAURA
real_data_entries.group: Osimertinib 80 mg QD vs gefitinib 250 mg QD or erlotinib 150 mg QD in treatment-naive advanced EGFR-mutant NSCLC (1st line); primary endpoint PFS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Soria JC et al. NEJM 2018;378:113-125 (FLAURA osimertinib 1L EGFR-mut).

real_data_entries.name: ADAURA
real_data_entries.group: Adjuvant osimertinib 80 mg QD x 3 years vs placebo after complete resection of stage IB-IIIA EGFR-mutant NSCLC and adjuvant chemotherapy if indicated; primary endpoint DFS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Wu YL et al. NEJM 2020;383:1711-1723 (ADAURA adjuvant osimertinib).

real_data_entries.name: FLAURA2
real_data_entries.group: Osimertinib + platinum-pemetrexed chemotherapy vs osimertinib monotherapy in treatment-naive advanced EGFR-mutant NSCLC; primary endpoint PFS

allOutcomes.title: Progression-free survival (primary; HR vs osimertinib monotherapy)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Planchard D et al. NEJM 2023;389:1935-1948 (FLAURA2 osimertinib + chemo 1L).
